name: Local Databases
description: A local relational + cache stack managed as background services. PostgreSQL is the default production-grade SQL database; Redis handles caching, queues, and sessions. Bundled GUI clients — TablePlus (Mac-native polish) and DBeaver (free and cross-platform) — let you browse tables, run queries, and inspect keys without living in the terminal. Start and stop the services from the Services tab; data grows on disk over time.
caveats: Databases grow with your data. Manage start/stop from the Services tab.
